raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1206 aims to develop battery manufacturing facilities for next generation batteries in California.",
    "The legislation will create a public-private partnership to establish a battery manufacturing hub in the Bay Area and Northern San Joaquin Valley.",
    "The public-private partnership model has been proven successful by ARCHES for clean hydrogen infrastructure and can also be used for solid-state battery manufacturing.",
    "SB 1206 aims to decrease costs and increase access to next-generation batteries.",
    "The legislation supports California's clean energy and electric vehicle deployment goals.",
    "Senator Becker's legislation aims to improve quality of life in California while working towards net-zero climate goals.",
    "The proposed legislation will provide support to the private sector in the innovation and commercialization of new technologies.",
    "SB 1206 aims to maximize workforce and equity benefits through its initiatives."
  ]
}
```
